CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2018 Off Calendar

Settlememt Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joshua C. Ezrin and Aaron H. Darshky, esq. (415-553-6055) of LEDA Law for Plaintiff Danilo Stewart.
Dawn A. Silberstein, esq. (415-433-0990) of Wilson Elser...LLP for Defendant ParkMerced Investors Properties, LLC.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Aaron Darsky, Esq. (415-553-6055) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Danilo Stewart.
Dawn Silberstein, Esq. (415-625-9255) for Defendant/Moving party Parkmerced Investors Properties, LLC.
Court reporter: Julie Zeigler, CSR 570, 415-357-4300, Reported. (501).

The Court announces the tentative ruling. ARGUED. Defendant Argued. Defendant argues late fee issue, punitive damages. Plaintiff submits to the tentative ruling. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Parkmerced Investors Properties, LLC'S Motion To Strike Complaint is denied in its entirety. From the face of the complaint, there is nothing false or improper in the way Plaintiff Danilo Stewart has worded his allegations involving the $75 late fee. Mr. Stewart adequately alleges entitlement to punitive damages.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) Order is signed in open court. (see scanned order for details)Judge: Ronald E.
